sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107288" key="u(perastronome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεραστρονομέω</orth>, <sense id="n107288.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">astronomize above and beyond,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οὐρανοῦ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
